items.title: Jupiter rallies 23% as Spot demand surges – But THIS may cap JUP’s upside
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's 23% rally indicates strong spot demand, but potential limitations on its growth could affect liquidity dynamics in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: DeepBook suffers $239.7K bad debt – What it means for leveraged DeFi
items.whyYouShouldCare: DeepBook's $239.7K bad debt highlights risks in leveraged DeFi, which may impact investor confidence and overall market stability on Solana.

items.title: After the $16.5 billion in exploits, DeFi is now being forced toward the controls it once resisted
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $16.5 billion in exploits pushes DeFi towards regulatory measures, potentially reshaping operational frameworks and risk management within the Solana ecosystem.
